message.content: {"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Which trials have Name of ICI equal to Atezolizumab?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Trial name\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Atezolizumab';"},{"question":"Which trials have Cancer type equal to Colorectal?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Trial name\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal';"},{"question":"Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Trial name\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';"},{"question":"Which trials satisfy Name of ICI = Atezolizumab AND Cancer type = Colorectal AND Control arm = Multikinase inhibitor?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Trial name\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Atezolizumab' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Control arm\" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the NCT numbers of trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and authors of trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and publication years of trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Year\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and originial publication or follow-up for trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and cancer types for trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and control regimens for trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Control regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"},{"question":"What are the NCT numbers and trial phases for trials where the control arm is an antibody-drug conjugate?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What trials have Trial phase equal to Phase 3?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Which trials are follow-up publications?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" = 'Follow-up';"},{"question":"Trials where Name of ICI is Durvalumab or Tremelimumab","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" IN ('Durvalumab', 'Tremelimumab');"},{"question":"Trials for gastric cancer or gastroesophageal junction cancer","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" IN ('Gastric cancer', 'Gastroesophageal junction cancer');"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Authors and ICI class for Multiple Myeloma trials where Class of ICI is PD1 and Included in MA is No.","sql":"SELECT \"Author\", \"Class of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1' AND \"Included in MA\" = 'No';"},{"question":"Authors and ICI class for Multiple Myeloma trials where Class of ICI is CTLA-4 and Included in MA is No.","sql":"SELECT \"Author\", \"Class of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Included in MA\" = 'No';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"NCT numbers for Phase 2 trials with Class of ICI = 'PD1, CTLA-4' in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Authors for Phase 2 trials with Class of ICI = 'PD1, CTLA-4' in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Years for Phase 2 trials with Class of ICI = 'PD1, CTLA-4' in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Year\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Originial publication or Follow-up for Phase 2 trials with Class of ICI = 'PD1, CTLA-4' in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Trial phase for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Class of ICI values for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Class of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Monotherapy/combination status for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Monotherapy/combination\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Cancer type values for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Names of ICI for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Name of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Treatment regimens for Phase 2 PD1+CTLA-4 melanoma trials?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Phase 3 Mesothelioma trials: list NCT, Author, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, Name of ICI, and Treatment regimen.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Mesothelioma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"Phase 3 Mesothelioma trials where Type of therapy is Immunotherapy.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Mesothelioma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Type of therapy\" = 'Immunotherapy';"},{"question":"Phase 3 Mesothelioma trials with immunotherapy where Control regimen is not Chemoradiation.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Mesothelioma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Type of therapy\" = 'Immunotherapy' AND \"Control regimen\" <> 'Chemoradiation';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the authors for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer trials using Ipilimumab that are Phase 2 and were Original publication?","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Ipilimumab' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2' AND \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" = 'Original publication';"},{"question":"What is the trial phase for those trials?","sql":"SELECT DISTINCT \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Name of ICI\" = 'Ipilimumab' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2' AND \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" = 'Original publication';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the NCT identifiers for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What are the Authors of Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What are the Years of Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Year\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Originial publication or Follow-up for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Trial phase for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Class of ICI for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Class of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Monotherapy/combination status for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Monotherapy/combination\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Cancer type for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"},{"question":"What is the Treatment regimen for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Class of ICI\" = 'CTLA-4' AND \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What trials have Cancer type = Small Cell Lung?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Included in MA\", \"Class of ICI\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Small Cell Lung';"},{"question":"Among Small Cell Lung cancer trials, which used PD-1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Included in MA\", \"Class of ICI\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"Among Small Cell Lung cancer trials using PD-1 inhibitors, which were Included in Meta-Analysis?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Included in MA\", \"Class of ICI\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%') AND \"Included in MA\" = 'Yes';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are the NCT numbers for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What are the Authors for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What are the Year values for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Year\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What is the Originial publication or Follow-up for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What is the Trial phase for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Trial phase\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What is the Class of ICI for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Class of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What is the Name of ICI for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Name of ICI\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"},{"question":"What is the Treatment regimen for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3' AND \"Monotherapy/combination\" = 'Combination' AND (\"Class of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%' OR \"Name of ICI\" LIKE '%PD-1%');"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"What are all trials with Cancer type Melanoma?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma';"},{"question":"What Melanoma trials have Phase 3?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 3';"},{"question":"What Melanoma trials involve Ipilimumab?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Name of ICI\" = 'Ipilimumab';"},{"question":"Which Melanoma trials are follow-up publications?","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Author\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Trial phase\", \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Melanoma' AND \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" = 'Follow-up';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"List authors of colorectal cancer studies with Type of combination equal to 'ICI+MEKi'.","sql":"SELECT \"Author\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"List years of publication or follow-up for these studies.","sql":"SELECT \"Year\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"What is the Originial publication or Follow-up for these studies?","sql":"SELECT \"Originial publication or Follow-up\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"What is the Type of combination used in these studies?","sql":"SELECT \"Type of combination\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"What is the Cancer type for these studies?","sql":"SELECT \"Cancer type\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"What treatment regimens were used in these studies?","sql":"SELECT \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"},{"question":"What were the primary endpoints reported in these studies?","sql":"SELECT \"Primary endpoint\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Type of combination\" = 'ICI+MEKi';"}]}

{"decomposed_queries":[{"question":"Get trials with Cancer type = 'Urothelial' and list NCT, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, Name of ICI, Treatment regimen.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Urothelial';"},{"question":"Get trials with Trial phase = 'Phase 2' and list NCT, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, Name of ICI, Treatment regimen.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Trial phase\" = 'Phase 2';"},{"question":"Get trials with Control arm = 'Placebo' and list NCT, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, Name of ICI, Treatment regimen.","sql":"SELECT \"NCT\", \"Year\", \"Originial publication or Follow-up\", \"Trial phase\", \"Control arm\", \"Cancer type\", \"Name of ICI\", \"Treatment regimen\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Control arm\" = 'Placebo';"}]}
